entities.description: pcie30 avdd 0v9 is a voltage supply that needs to meet specific requirements for the pcie30phy to function properly
pcie30 avdd 1v8 is a voltage supply that needs to meet specific requirements for the pcie30phy to function properly
rk3588 pcie30phy is a hardware component that requires proper power supply and clock input to function correctly

relations.description: the rk3588 pcie30phy requires the pcie30 avdd 0v9 voltage supply to function properly
the rk3588 pcie30phy requires the pcie30 avdd 1v8 voltage supply to function properly
the rk3588 pcie30phy relies on the external crystal oscillator chip for clock input  which is critical for proper operation
